Notice Of Motion For Order To Accept Deposit Of Surplus Funds, To Disharge Petitioner, And To Hear Claims To Surplus Funds

MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Garett L. Wong; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
No Appearance by plaintiff/moving party
Via Court Call: Attorney Joseph P. Buchman, Esq. of Burke Williams & Sorensen, LLP (213-236-0600), counsel for defendant/opposing party

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MTC FINANCIAL INC's Motion For Order To Accept Deposit Of Surplus Funds, To Disharge Petitioner, And To Hear Claims To Surplus Funds GRANTED. Moving party shall deposit the funds within 30 days. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
